bear.name: Bear
bear.sidebar: Above: A bear stands next to a body a water.
bear.info: Bears are large mammals found in northern forests. Bears will eat berries, fish, and small mammals. Bears' diet drive competion between the lynxes and bears for small mammals.

deer.name: Deer
deer.sidebar: Above: A deer crossing a snowy landscape.
deer.info: Deer are medium-sized mammals found in nothern forests. Deer eat grasses, shrubs and fruit.

lingonberries.name: Lingonberries
lingonberries.info: Lingonberries are small evergreen shrubs that can be made into jam.

lynx.name: Lynx
lynx.sidebar: Above: A lynx appears to be looking at the camera.
lynx.info: Lynxes are large cats found in North American and Eurasia. Lynxes eat small deer and other small mammals.

moose.name: Moose
moose.sidebar: Above: A moose stands in a field.
moose.info: Moose, also known as elk are large mammals found in North America and Eurasia. Moose eat many different types of plants and fruit.

mushrooms.name: Mushrooms
mushrooms.sidebar: Above: A group of mushrooms are growning on a tree.
mushrooms.info: Mushrooms are the fruiting bodies of underground fungi, which decompose dead plant and animal matter. Mushrooms are eaten by squirrels, deer, and bears.

wolf.name: Wolf
wolf.sidebar: Above: A lone wolf standing in a snowy landscape.
wolf.info: Wolves are are canivorous mammals that hunt in packs that are found in North America and Eurasia. Wolves eat moose and deer.
